description: Contact form section with heading, subtext, and 3-field form (name, email, message). Uses Bricks native form element with fields[] array.

settings.successMessage: Thank you! We will be in touch soon.
settings._cssCustom: %root% { width: 100%; } %root% .form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; } %root% label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #333; } %root% input, %root% textarea { width: 100%; padding: 14px 18px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.2s; box-sizing: border-box; } %root% input:focus, %root% textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0a0a0a; } %root% textarea { min-height: 140px; resize: vertical; } %root% button[type=submit] { background: #0a0a0a; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 16px 40px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } %root% button[type=submit]:hover { background: #333; }
